ddt:Target.Name: R0-13 v2.6
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ******************** DD/MM/YYYY: Change description
v0.1 11/01/2012 : Creation based on R0-10 v0.9 database and compliant with DTS 1.4 v0.2 05/04/2012 : Compliance with DTS 1.5 and 1.6 v0.3 05/07/2012 : Compliance with DTS 1.7 v0.4 17/10/2012 : Compliance with Daimler specification : - Correction of R0-13 auto identification - Correction of IO Controls frames v0.5 14/12/2012 : Compliance with Daimler specification : - Correction of IO Controls frames Compliance with DTS 1.8 v0.6 02/07/2013 : Compliance with DTS 1.9
v 0.7 26/07/2013: Updated according to DTS v1.9 HFE project checked v 0.8 06/12/2013: Updated according to DTS v2.0 v 0.9 20/03/2014: status and stop length request updated v 1.0 30/04/2014: Tuner settings frequency data updated v 1.1 16/12/2014: Updated according to DTS v2.1 and v2.2 v 1.2 08/09/2015: Updated according to DTS v2.3 and v2.4 -Button screen updated with SWRC types 0420 & 492R v 1.3 26/02/2016: Added Roger/error beep volume $2C1C v 1.4 21/07/2016: Updated as per DTS v2.5,2.6,2.7 v 1.5 26/10/2016: Updated as per DTS v2.8 v 1.6 10/01/2017: R&Go parameters change for Daimler project and change in Autoidents v1.7 02/03/2017: AutoIdents added for SW D1.7 v1.8 20/12/2017: Autodents added
V1.9 16/07/2018: xHAph2 and xBC projects added in CNF_CAR($2C24) New parameter for Hebrew display DISPLAY_HEBREW CNF_HEBREW_DISPLAY ($2C45) Auto Ident : <AutoIdent DiagVersion="88" Supplier="93E" Soft="0007" Version="0609"/> China and Brazil added to Radio country CNF_CNT ($2C11) -> $08 China, $09 Brazil
V2.0: 03/09/2018 Update of XBC project as $21
V2.1: 15/05/2019 Auto identifaction ID $5C is newly added in auto identification list
V2.2: 28/10/2019 Auto identifaction ID $5C is newly added in auto identification list
$5C with soft value 000, vesrion 0404 is deleted
V2.3: 04/12/2020 Addition of XBG in project applicability Removal of BaseChecker errors
V2.5: 20/09/2021 Addition of VS10 in project applicability.
V2.6: 20/10/2021 Auto- identification updated with new version 92 ($5C) 93E 0007 0703.

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: Radio country
Data.Comment: Frequency bandwith for tuner AM/FM according to world area

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear

Data.Name: VIN.CRC
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Item.Text: No test in progress. Test OK

Data.Name: ANT1.Frequency value
Data.Comment: Frequency Tune $xxx.x, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM$xxxx [KHz], 9KHz step if LW

Data.Name: Internal.StoredScripts.Default
Data.Comment: List of stored script for BIC

Data.Name: Internal.StoredScripts.X62
Data.Comment: List of stored script for BIC

Data.Name: Internal.StoredScripts.X07M
Data.Comment: List of stored script for BIC

Data.Name: CANM.RefMessagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Data.Name: CANV.RefMessagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Data.Name: Internal.StoredScripts.X82
Data.Comment: List of stored script for BIC

Data.Name: Internal.StoredScripts.X07V
Data.Comment: List of stored script for BIC

Data.Name: Internal.StoredScripts.HFE
Data.Comment: List of stored script for BIC

Data.Name: Internal.StoredScripts.X61
Data.Comment: List of stored script for BIC

Data.Name: VIN.VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Fixed value (identifies a break in the ECU diag definition)

Data.Name: HardwareNumber.LowerPart
Data.Comment: Identifies the hardware version of the ECU

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version active in the ECU

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Identifies the software version (edition) active in the ECU

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.Daimler
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Nissan ID

Request.Name: StartDefaultSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ECUReset.keyoffon
Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: IO.Availibility
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: IO.Availibility2
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
- except for phone acoustic parameters, acoustic paremeters, radio reception, ...
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account
AM FM antenna ph pw supply
Instantaneous fascia buttons values printed for 2s
Memorized fascia buttons values if pressed for 5 minutes
AM FM antenna ph pw supply
Instantaneous SWRC buttons values printed for 2s
Instantaneous OSW buttons values printed for 2s
USE WITH CAUTION : once activated, it won't be possible to deactivate it !
Those parameters are used to configure the bluetooth phone.
Those parameters are used to configure Arkamys acoustic parameters
Those parameters are used to configure radio reception parameters
Those parameters are used to configure radio reception parameters
Those parameters are used to configure SPVR parameters
This routine is used to test microphone.
R0-13 generates a sound on the stereo output and checks if the sound is captured by microphone.
By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone following loudspeaker line number, frequency and sound level given as parameters.
This routine is used to test graphic segments of radio screen.
When requested by diag tool, radio shall put all segments to bright or black.
